name: poe2-build-mcp
description: Your AI build companion for Path of Exile 2. Import a build for real Path of Building numbers, theorycraft and optimize upgrades, search items, gems, and uniques, and check live prices — every stat computed by the engine, never guessed.

luajit_path.title: LuaJIT executable path
luajit_path.description: Absolute path to luajit(.exe). Leave blank to auto-detect on PATH or in a standard MSYS2 location.

tools.name: import_build
tools.description: Import a build from a PoB code, pobb.in/pastebin link, or XML.

tools.name: get_build_stats
tools.description: PoB-computed stats for the active build.

tools.name: set_skill
tools.description: Set the active build's main skill.

tools.name: set_class
tools.description: Set character class + ascendancy from scratch.

tools.name: set_level
tools.description: Set character level (1-100).

tools.name: set_config
tools.description: Set combat config and/or extra modifiers.

tools.name: equip_item
tools.description: Equip an item from raw PoB item text.

tools.name: evaluate_build
tools.description: Check the build against numeric goals.

tools.name: compare_to
tools.description: A/B the active build against another.

tools.name: solve_for
tools.description: Solve for the modifier magnitude needed to hit a stat target.

tools.name: rank_levers
tools.description: Rank stat levers by marginal gain — the min/max 'where to invest' tool.

tools.name: search_passives
tools.description: Search the passive tree.

tools.name: alloc_passive
tools.description: Allocate a passive node (auto-routed).

tools.name: dealloc_passive
tools.description: Deallocate a passive node.

tools.name: optimize_passives
tools.description: Greedily allocate points to maximize a stat (or 'balanced').

tools.name: scaffold_gear
tools.description: Fill empty defensive slots with placeholder gear to close resist/pool gaps.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search item bases.

tools.name: find_skills
tools.description: Find skill/support gems.

tools.name: get_gem
tools.description: Get a gem's details.

tools.name: search_mods
tools.description: Search affixes by readable text.

tools.name: reverse_lookup
tools.description: Find sources of a stat.

tools.name: search_uniques
tools.description: Search unique items.

tools.name: get_unique
tools.description: Get a unique item's full text.

tools.name: parse_item
tools.description: Parse an item's text: affix tiers (T1=best) + open prefix/suffix slots.

tools.name: list_ascendancies
tools.description: List ascendancies.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Full data for one item base.

tools.name: get_passive
tools.description: Details for one passive node.

tools.name: corpus_info
tools.description: Bundled corpus version and counts.

tools.name: engine_health
tools.description: Engine + install diagnostics (liveness, versions, data source).

tools.name: get_prices
tools.description: Live currency/unique prices (poe2scout).

tools.name: list_price_leagues
tools.description: List PoE2 leagues available for pricing.

tools.name: get_meta_builds
tools.description: Live ascendancy popularity from poe.ninja (context, not a recommendation).

tools.name: lookup_mechanic
tools.description: Fetch a mechanic/skill/item explanation live from the PoE2 Wiki (long-tail fallback).

tools.name: check_data_version
tools.description: Corpus freshness vs upstream.

tools.name: update_corpus
tools.description: Rebuild the corpus from RePoE locally.

tools.name: check_for_updates
tools.description: Check for a newer validated release.

tools.name: apply_updates
tools.description: Install the latest validated release.

tools.name: get_build
tools.description: Full read-back of the active build.

tools.name: export_build
tools.description: Export the build as a PoB import code.

tools.name: get_defenses
tools.description: Defensive summary (life/ES, resists, EHP).

tools.name: unequip_item
tools.description: Clear an equipment slot.

tools.name: list_config_options
tools.description: List set_config keys and values.

tools.name: find_supports_for
tools.description: Find supports for a skill.

tools.name: explain_mechanic
tools.description: Mechanic reference: our principle + attributed wiki page (CC BY-NC-SA).

tools.name: search_mechanics
tools.description: Full-text search the bundled wiki mechanics tier.

tools.name: relevant_mechanics
tools.description: Mechanics worth reading for the active build + the engine damage diagnostic.

tools.name: build_advice
tools.description: Evergreen PoE2 build-optimization principles (durable rules).
